message:
bd-2cjt: Add interactive start wizard

Adds optional interactive setup wizard using Prompt system:
- Run mode: full demo vs specific scene
- Speed: normal vs quick
- Export: yes/no

Wizard only runs when:
- Interactive mode is allowed
- Console is a TTY
- No CLI arguments override defaults

Falls back to defaults in all other cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
